seoTitle: Turners Marsh vs Tyenna — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Turners Marsh and Tyenna. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Turners Marsh vs Tyenna: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Turners Marsh and Tyenna.
heading: Turners Marsh vs Tyenna — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Turners Marsh, Tasmania and Tyenna, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Turners Marsh has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Tyenna (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Turners Marsh or Tyenna safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Turners Marsh has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Tyenna scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Turners Marsh scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Tyenna scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Turners Marsh or Tyenna?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Turners Marsh has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
